corrections.text: Few people know that a tiny Alpine lake lies at the head of one of the hollows above the lower falls."

corrections.description: Contains publication header that belongs to the next article
corrections.text: Editor's Note: Affecting the matter of memorials for past Presidents, a memorial was recently decided upon, by the General Board, for Eliza Roxey Snow. Other memorials will be considered later.

corrections.description: Article ends mid-sentence, missing the final words about Dr. Howe's quote
corrections.text: Howe, the great teacher of Laura Bridgman, that "obstacles are things to be overcome."

corrections.description: Contains editorial board information that should be in a separate section
corrections.text:
Frozen Rhubarb
1 qt. Rhubarb juice and pulp. 1c. Sugar. 1 c. Orange juice. 1 qt. Cream.
Grated rind of 1 lemon may be added. Combine first four ingredients; freeze to mushy consistency. Add cream; finish freezing. Pack and let stand 2 hrs. before serving.

corrections.description: File contains only the header, missing the actual lesson content
corrections.text: Content appears to be missing from OCR - only header present

notes: Most files are correctly extracted. The main issues are incomplete articles due to OCR gaps and some bleed-through of editorial content. The Work and Business lesson appears to be missing its content entirely from the OCR source.
